final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 smartphone product launch, brand exposure focused.

Style/medium: bold product photography with graphic design overlay, commercial advertising aesthetic, high visual impact
Composition: vertical 9:16 format, centered hero product shot with generous negative space for branding, eye-level product angle
Subject: OPPO Find X9 smartphone, sleek modern device with reflective glass back, clean edges, premium finish
Scene/backdrop: gradient studio background transitioning from deep navy to electric blue, subtle light rays, abstract geometric elements
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting highlighting device contours, soft fill light on front, futuristic and premium mood
Color palette: OPPO brand green as accent, deep blues as base, silver/white highlights, high contrast for visual punch
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9"
Constraints: must work at 1080×1920 resolution; brand logo must remain legible at thumbnail size; visual hierarchy prioritizes product over text
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic stock photo aesthetic, muddy colors, excessive text, watermark, 8K stuffer words
